meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Version Control for Students
content.seo_description: Master version control with the Antigravity project template. A hands-on guide for students using Claude Code to build robust, professional-grade AI applications.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity template provides an automated, opinionated Git-integrated scaffold that eliminates version control chaos. By combining this structure with Claude Code's autonomous file management, you gain an enterprise-grade workflow that tracks every iteration, ensures reproducibility, and secures your codebase, allowing you to focus entirely on feature development and architectural growth.
content.intro:
You have spent hours crafting the perfect logic, only to realize you have no idea which version of your code actually works. The 'final_final_v2' folder structure is a trap that kills your velocity and destroys your confidence as a developer. Without a robust version control foundation, your best ideas remain trapped in a fragile, unmanaged state.

But what if your project setup was inherently resilient? By leveraging the Antigravity template, you stop fighting against your own codebase and start building with the precision of a senior engineer. This guide transforms your chaotic workflow into a professional-grade pipeline, ensuring your portfolio projects are as stable as they are innovative.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Environment
steps.description: Establish the root directory with the standardized Antigravity structure to ensure all future commits are tracked via Git hooks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project structure using the Antigravity template with strict Git integration and automated pre-commit hooks.

steps.title: Automate Versioning with Claude Code
steps.description: Configure Claude Code to automatically commit changes after every logical feature completion to maintain a clean history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the current project to use Claude Code for automated semantic versioning and descriptive commit messaging.

steps.title: Define Architectural Boundaries
steps.description: Use the Antigravity config to enforce directory separation between core logic and experimental UI components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create architectural boundaries that isolate core AI logic from UI components, preventing accidental state corruption.

steps.title: Implement Atomic Feature Branches
steps.description: Use Claude Code to spin up isolated feature branches, ensuring your main branch remains production-ready at all times.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new feature branch for the authentication module and set up automated testing triggers.

steps.title: Verify Code Integrity and Sync
steps.description: Run a final verification to ensure all changes are tracked and linked to your remote repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the repository for untracked files and sync all local changes to the remote origin.

pro_tips: Always use semantic commit messages (feat, fix, docs, refactor) to make your portfolio look professional to hiring managers.
Enable Git hooks in your Antigravity template to automatically run linting before allowing a commit.
Use Claude Code to write your README.md files by pointing it at your codebase—it keeps documentation perfectly in sync with your code.
Never commit your .env files; use the Antigravity template's built-in .gitignore to protect your API keys.
Treat your Git history as a narrative; frequent, small commits are better than one massive, unreadable 'update' push.
resources: Git Best Practices for Students: https://git-scm.com/doc
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is locked down, move to integrating external APIs using the secure patterns established in your template.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the workflow, and the architecture to build something that actually lasts. Stop guessing and start shipping code that mirrors the quality of top-tier engineering teams. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
